ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 has been confirmed
ham.body:
Hi [Name],

Apka Amazon order #1234567890 confirm ho gaya hai. Yeh items ab aapke cart me hain:

• 1x Wireless Mouse – ₹799
• 2x USB‑C Cable – ₹199 each

Estimated delivery: 3-5 working days.

Aap order status ko Amazon app ya website par track kar sakte hain.

Thank you for shopping with us.

Best regards,
Amazon India Team

spam.subject: Urgent: You’ve Been Invited to a Zoom Meeting – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

Please be advised that you have been invited to a confidential Zoom meeting scheduled for tomorrow 10:00 AM IST. This meeting is mandatory as it involves critical updates regarding your account. Failure to attend may result in suspension of your privileges.

Meeting ID: 123-456-7890
Password: abc123

To join, click here: <URL>

If you did not request this meeting, please contact our support immediately.

Regards,
Zoom Support Team
